mapper.select: SELECT l.id, u.name AS userName, lt.name AS leaveTypeName, aps.status AS approvalStatus, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, l.approved_at AS approvedAt, u.name AS approvedBy FROM leave l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON l.leavetype_id = lt.id LEFT JOIN approval_status aps ON l.approval_status_id = aps.id WHERE u.id = #{id}

SELECT l.id, u.name AS userName, lt.name AS leaveTypeName, aps.status AS approvalStatus, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, l.approved_at AS approvedAt, u.name AS approvedBy FROM leave l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON l.leavetype_id = lt.id LEFT JOIN approval_status aps ON l.approval_status_id = aps.id WHERE l.created_at >= now() - make_interval(months => #{month});

SELECT l.id, u.name AS userName, lt.name AS leaveTypeName, aps.status AS approvalStatus, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, l.approved_at AS approvedAt, u.name AS approvedBy FROM leave l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON l.leavetype_id = lt.id LEFT JOIN approval_status aps ON l.approval_status_id = aps.id WHERE l.approval_status_id = #{approvalStatusId};

SELECT l.id, u.name AS userName, lt.name AS leaveTypeName, aps.status AS approvalStatus, l.start_date AS startDate, l.end_date AS endDate, l.approved_at AS approvedAt, u.name AS approvedBy FROM leave l LEFT JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN leave_type lt ON l.leavetype_id = lt.id LEFT JOIN approval_status aps ON l.approval_status_id = aps.id;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave (user_id, leavetype_id, approval_status_id, start_date, end_date, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{leaveTypeId}, #{approvalStatusId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reason})
